meaning: n.[植]起绒草vt.使起绒adj.川续断科(植物)的
examples: European teasel with white to pink flowers; naturalized in United States.
Methods: The components Himalayan teasel root and Panax notoginseng were identified by TLC.
Yaoxitong capsule is composed with 22 kinds of traditional Chinese Medicine include Dahurian Angelica Root, Kusnezoff Monkshood Root, Himalayan Teasel Root, Twotoothed Achyranthes Root, Sanchi etc.
